ci-local.hooksPathNote: install.sh computes the actual path via realpath; downstream projects that copy ci-local/ to .ci-local/ will see '.ci-local/hooks' here
ci-local.description: Local Docker-based CI replacement for GitHub Actions

security-baseline.description: Regression gate: blocks PRs that introduce NEW vulns vs baseline

ai-attribution-blocker.description: Best-effort commit-msg hook with Unicode normalization. NOT an adversarial security control.
ai-attribution-blocker.threatModel: accidental copy-paste of AI tool output; whitespace/markdown/emoji tricks; combining diacritics; common Unicode invisibles
outOfScope: bare provider name without verb+preposition context (high false-positive risk)
ai-attribution-blocker.recommendation: for adversarial threat models, use signed commits + human review

supply-chain.description: Caret-bounded overrides for known-vulnerable transitive deps

self-dogfooding.description: javi-forge runs its own tools against itself in CI

findingsAddressed: missing javi-forge CLI prereq check in install.sh
tmp-file leak in test suite (added trap EXIT)
knownLimitations: commit-msg blocker: cross-script homoglyphs, tag chars, variation selectors not detected — see modules.ai-attribution-blocker.outOfScope
ci-local/install.sh: TOCTOU between command -v check at install time and PATH resolution at commit time — accepted; mitigated via path warnings + readlink

ci-local PowerShell port (install.ps1, ci-local.ps1, lib/common.psm1): syntax-validated against pwsh 7.6 on Linux; end-to-end tested in detect mode. Not yet smoke-tested on a real Windows host — needs validation in a real environment before tagging a release
